name: Lex
description: The Lex is a powerful, accurate pistol that has a low Fire Rate and Magazine Capacity. Very efficient at long range.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.5: Sisters of Parvos
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Lex Prime’s clip being offset and rotated horizontally with the Lex Conclave skin equipped.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed duplicate clip eject on Lex Prime and Euphona Prime when the Oscira Pistol Skin is equipped.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.additions: Added an AkLex Conclave Skin to Teshin’s Conclave Offerings!

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.changes: The Riven Cycle screen now gives you the option to view the Riven stats on every owned variant of said weapon. For example, I can now select either my normal Lex or my Lex Prime to view it’s said Stats.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Lex Prime not using its proper reload animation.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect placement of the Lex Conclave Skin on the Lex Prime.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Update 23.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Lex and Lex Prime having no revolver magazine or fire sounds with the Perla Pistol Skin.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Update 21.7.0
patchlogs.changes: Lex headshot multiplier reduced to 1.5x in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: U2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect materials on Paris Prime and Lex Prime attachments.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Update 2
patchlogs.changes: Lex Prime, Paris Prime, Dakra Prime, Sicarus Prime, and Ankyros Prime have received the PBR treatment!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.10 & Tactial Alert: Divine Will
patchlogs.changes:
Increased the damage of the Lex series in Conclave.
Increased the headshot multiplier of the Lex series in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage of Lex Prime in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.4
patchlogs.changes: Decreased the Lex’s damage in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.7.0 Nova Prime
patchlogs.fixes: Added Orokin Ducat cost to Lex Prime Blueprint.

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon
patchlogs.changes: Loki Prime's decoy now holds a Lex Prime!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Placeholder Lex Prime description & wrong stats.

patchlogs.name: Update 11.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Aklex (Akimbo Lex pistols) added to the Market

patchlogs.name: Update 9.5: Operation Arid Fear
patchlogs.changes:
Added custom reload animations for Dera, Supra, Lanka, Ogris, Lex, and Kraken.
Added custom reload sounds for Strun, Dera, Supra, Gorgon, Ignis, Grakata, Acrid, Kraken, Hek, and Lex.

patchlogs.name: Update 6.4 Hotfixes
patchlogs.changes: Lex balancing (less recoil, slightly higher fire rate)
